title: Notch Enchanted Apple UpPort
description: Brings back the old enchanted golden apple recipe . Minecraft 1.9
body:
![classic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52f5459fe12752041a353750f8c2987349e4f1f8.png)
**📖 About**
Missing the glory days when you could craft a Notch Apple?
This mod brings back the classic recipe for the Enchanted Golden Apple, just like it was before it was removed in Minecraft 1.9.

**🛠️ Features**
Restores the original recipe:
8 Gold Blocks + 1 Apple
![recoipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04b1eca21e3d1f994a0e424d8dd842dc8adfb7af.png)

**⚔️ Why?**
The enchanted golden apple has always been one of the most powerful items in Minecraft.
With this mod, you can once again craft your own, instead of relying only on rare loot chests.

**📦 Perfect for**
Players who want a classic Minecraft feel.

Servers that enjoy old-school recipes.

Anyone who loves powerful endgame items.

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ
#AD
